content: agent1: working on Add Template Path Normalization feature. Will modify src/jinja2/loaders.py - FileSystemLoader.get_source() and PackageLoader.get_source() to normalize paths with os.path.normpath(). Let me know if you're touching loaders.py too.

agent1: My changes are minimal - just added os.path.normpath(template) inside FileSystemLoader.get_source() and PackageLoader.get_source(), each a single-line change to the pieces = split_template_path(...) call. Shouldn't conflict with your __init__/auto_reload additions unless you also touch get_source() bodies. Let me know if you need to change those lines too.
